title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, April 11 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 12/04/2023
Image reference: 2023-04-12_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-april-11-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have remained stable
Panamax Luck Fortune (76,700 DWT, Apr 2002, Imabari) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 9.80 mil, VV Value USD 10.87 mil - BWTS. Supramax Amis Leader (58,100 DWT, Dec 2010, Tsuneishi Zhoushan) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 18.00 mil, VV Value USD 17.17 mil - DD Due. Supramax Haut Brion (57,100 DWT, Dec 2011, Taizhou Sanfu Shipbuilding) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 14.00 mil, VV Value USD 14.30 mil - BWTS.
